## 0. Campaign Structure Overview (Visual Reference)
[Image: data:image/png;base64,]
This diagram defines the allowed campaign types, priority level, and intent for each lifecycle stage. Campaigns are not added arbitrarily — they are introduced only when the portfolio is ready for them.
